title: Logistics Engineers
description: Design or analyze operational solutions for projects such as transportation optimization, network modeling, process and methods analysis, cost containment, capacity enhancement, routing and shipment optimization, or information management.

tasks.text: Identify cost-reduction or process-improvement logistic opportunities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze or interpret logistics data involving customer service, forecasting, procurement, manufacturing, inventory, transportation, or warehousing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Prepare logistic strategies or conceptual designs for production facilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct logistics studies or analyses, such as time studies, zero-base analyses, rate analyses, network analyses, flow-path analyses, or supply chain analyses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop logistic metrics, internal analysis tools, or key performance indicators for business units.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify or develop business rules or standard operating procedures to streamline operating processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interview key staff or tour facilities to identify efficiency-improvement, cost-reduction, or service-delivery opportunities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply logistics modeling techniques to address issues, such as operational process improvement or facility design or layout.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design plant distribution centers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review contractual commitments, customer specifications, or related information to determine logistics or support requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Evaluate the use of inventory tracking technology, Web-based warehousing software, or intelligent conveyor systems to maximize plant or distribution center efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Propose logistics solutions for customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop or maintain cost estimates, forecasts, or cost models.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare or validate documentation on automated logistics or maintenance-data reporting or management information systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide logistical facility or capacity planning analyses for distribution or transportation functions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine feasibility of designing new facilities or modifying existing facilities, based on factors such as cost, available space, schedule, technical requirements, or ergonomics.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design comprehensive supply chains that minimize environmental impacts or costs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create models or scenarios to predict the impact of changing circumstances, such as fuel costs, road pricing, energy taxes, or carbon emissions legislation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine logistics support requirements, such as facility details, staffing needs, or safety or maintenance plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop specifications for equipment, tools, facility layouts, or material-handling systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide logistics technology or information for effective and efficient support of product, equipment, or system manufacturing or service.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Evaluate effectiveness of current or future logistical processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Direct the work of logistics analysts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate the use of technologies, such as global positioning systems (GPS), radio-frequency identification (RFID), route navigation software, or satellite linkup systems, to improve transportation efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Determine requirements for compliance with environmental certification standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop or document procedures to minimize or mitigate carbon output resulting from the movement of materials or products.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct environmental audits for logistics activities, such as storage, distribution, or transportation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop or document reverse logistics management processes to ensure maximal efficiency of product recycling, reuse, or final disposal.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review global, national, or regional transportation or logistics reports for ways to improve efficiency or minimize the environmental impact of logistics activities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Assess the environmental impact or energy efficiency of logistics activities, using carbon mitigation software.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
